TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Blake_Ahearn, title = Blake_Ahearn, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Blake_Ahearn} }

S.FORM: Blake Ahearn sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 5, Blake Ahearn, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya ) Blake Ahearn mqwas biru maki Immacolata St. Louis laqii pqwasan cikuy. hiya ga mzyu mari cyugal kawas maki pqwasan biru. kawas tay 2003-2007 maki Missouri hopa pqwasan biru praw squliq na p'unro. yalaw gi rnagaI qilis ruw. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Blake Ahearn sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 5, Blake Ahearn, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya ) Blake Ahearn mqwas biru maki Immacolata St. Louis laqii pqwasan cikuy. hiya ga mzyu mari cyugal kawas maki pqwasan biru. kawas tay 2003-2007 maki Missouri hopa pqwasan biru praw squliq na p'unro. yalaw gi rnagaI qilis ruw. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ő≤lake ańßearn s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ő≤lake ańßearn, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja ) ő≤lake ańßearn mqwas~…ē ő≤iru maki imma ¶~ ®olata s~…ēt. louis~…ē laqii pqwas~…ēan ¶~ ®ikuj. ńßija …£a mzju mari ¶~ ®ju…£al kawas~…ē maki pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. kawas~…ē taj ****-**** maki mis~…ēs~…ēouri ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru praw s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. jalaw …£i rna…£ai qilis~…ē ruw. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
